name: C.s.beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornstarch, salt, and paprika in a shallow dish.
2. Dredge the meat lightly in this mixture, reserving the rest for later use.
3. Toss the meat cubes with oil in an oven-safe casserole dish.
4. Bake uncovered at 450°F (230°C) for 30 minutes, stirring once.
5. Add carrots, celery, and onions to the dish.
6. Add potatoes.
7. Combine the reserved cornstarch, mushroom soup, onion soup mix, Worcestershire sauce, and gravy browning in another shallow dish.
8. Gradually add milk to this mixture.
9. Pour over the meat and vegetables.
10. Cover and bake at a reduced temperature of 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
11. Stir and continue baking for an additional 45 minutes or until the meat is tender.
